_note: Q-Models launchpad catalog (DEMO MOCK). Mirrors the real model launch scripts in the Q-Models repo (github.com/rohanaryagondi/Q-Models, aws/*_eval.py + *_userdata.sh). In the demo these return shaped, labeled-MOCK outputs; in production each entry maps to an AWS GPU launch with the same I/O contract.

models.name: Boltz-2
models.note: AF3-class co-folding + affinity head; the cascade already proved it runs on a T4.

models.name: ADMET-AI
models.note: calibrated ADMET; preferred over MAMMAL ClinTox (Q-Mammal).

models.name: CNS DTI head
models.note: single-target triage; off-the-shelf ~chance on Nav (Q-Mammal) — Quiver fine-tune is the lever.

models.name: Quiver ion-channel fine-tune
models.note: QUIVER-DATA fine-tune — the one place a trained head beats off-the-shelf.
